creator: mdh@solitox.net
text:
The URL referenced in the ath(4) man page for a list of hardware supported by this driver is defunct.  The URL in question is "http://customerproducts.atheros.com/customerproducts".

Fix: 

List the supported hardware in the man page as is the case in many other driver man pages or find/create a new web page that isn't defunct.
How-To-Repeat: `man ath`
